popularStory.headline: Memerial
popularStory.description: Roger Bigod (c. 1144/1150 – 1221) was the son of Hugh Bigod, 1st Earl of Norfolk and his first wife, Juliana de Vere. Although his father died in 1176 or 1177, Roger did not succeed to the earldom of …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Roger Bigod 3rd Earl of Norfolk and Suffolk於1144年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可福拉苗林加姆 卡素時，他的父親Hugh Bigod 2nd Earl of Norfolk49歲，母親Juliana de Vere28歲。他於大約1181年12月與Ida de Tosny Countess of Norfolk結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他於1220年在多明尼克聖 保羅羅傑被列為constable  at norwich castle。他去世於1220年8月2日在英國英格蘭諾福爾可特福德享年76歲，埋葬在英國諾福爾可特福德特福德 普利奧利。

nameMeanings.name: Bigod
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Polish Jaroslaw, Jozef, Krystyna, Slawomir.

Polish and Jewish (from Poland): from bigos, formerlydenoting anything that was chopped or slashed, now a particular dishcomposed of hash and sauerkraut; also ‘confusion’; hence perhaps anickname for someone who caused confusion.

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

en.lifeSummary: When Roger Bigod 3rd Earl of Norfolk and Suffolk was born in 1144, in Framlingham Castle, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, Hugh Bigod 2nd Earl of Norfolk, was 49 and his mother, Juliana de Vere, was 28. He married Ida de Tosny Countess of Norfolk about December 1181. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 6 daughters. In 1220, his occupation is listed as constable  at norwich castle in Roger, Saint Paul, Dominica. He died on 2 August 1220, in Thetford, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 76, and was buried in Thetford Priory, Thetford, Norfolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roger Bigod 3rd Earl of Norfolk and Suffolk est né en 1144, à Framlingham Castle, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Hugh Bigod 2nd Earl of Norfolk, avait 49 ans et sa mère, Juliana de Vere, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Ida de Tosny Countess of Norfolk environ décembre 1181. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 6 filles. En 1220, sa profession de son indiquée est constable  at norwich castle à Roger, Saint Paul, Dominique. Il est décédé le 2 août 1220, à Thetford, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 76 ans, et a été enterré à Thetford Priory, Thetford, Norfolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Roger Bigod 3rd Earl of Norfolk and Suffolk 1144 in Framlingham Castle, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hugh Bigod 2nd Earl of Norfolk 49 und seine Mutter Juliana de Vere 28. Er hat um Dezember 1181 Ida de Tosny Countess of Norfolk geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 6 Töchter. 1220 ist sein Beruf als constable  at norwich castle in Roger, Saint Paul, Dominica aufgeführt. Er starb am 2. August 1220 im Alter von 76 Jahren in Thetford, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Thetford Priory, Thetford, Norfolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Roger Bigod 3rd Earl of Norfolk and Suffolk è nato il nel 1144 nel Framlingham Castle, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Hugh Bigod 2nd Earl of Norfolk, aveva 49 anni e il suo madre, Juliana de Vere, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Ida de Tosny Countess of Norfolk circa dicembre 1181. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 6 figlie. Nel 1220, la sua occupazione è indicata come constable  at norwich castle nel Roger, Saint Paul, Dominica. Morì il 2 agosto 1220, nel Thetford, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 76 anni, e fu sepolto a Thetford Priory, Thetford, Norfolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Roger Bigod 3rd Earl of Norfolk and Suffolkが1144年にイギリスイギリススフォルクフラムリンガム カストルで生まれた時，父Hugh Bigod 2nd Earl of Norfolkは49歳，母Juliana de Vereは28歳であった。約1181年12月にIda de Tosny Countess of Norfolkと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。1220年，ドミニカサイント プアウルロジャーでの職業はconstable  at norwich castleと記録されている。彼は1220年8月2日にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクスエトフォードで76歳で死去し，イギリスノーフォルクスエトフォードスエトフォード プリオリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Roger Bigod 3rd Earl of Norfolk and Suffolk(이)가 1144년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 프램링함 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugh Bigod 2nd Earl of Norfolk(은)는 49세였고, 그의 어머니 Juliana de Vere(은)는 28세였다. 그는 대략 1181년 12월 Ida de Tosny Countess of Norfolk(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 1220년, 그의 직업은 도미니카 세인트 폴 로거에서 constable  at norwich castle이었다. 그는 1220년 8월 2일 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 테트퍼드에서 76세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르폴크 테트퍼드 테트퍼드 플리오리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Roger Bigod 3rd Earl of Norfolk and Suffolk nasceu em 1144, em Framlingham Castle, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Hugh Bigod 2nd Earl of Norfolk, tinha 49 anos e sua mãe, Juliana de Vere, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Ida de Tosny Countess of Norfolk aproximadamente dezembro de 1181. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 6 filhas. Em 1220, sua profissão aparece como constable  at norwich castle em Roger, Saint Paul, Dominica. Ele faleceu em 2 de agosto de 1220, em Thetford, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 76 anos, e foi sepultado em Thetford Priory, Thetford, Norfolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roger Bigod 3rd Earl of Norfolk and Suffolk родился в 1144 г. в местности фрамлингхам кастл, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Hugh Bigod 2nd Earl of Norfolk было 49 лет, а матери, которую звали Juliana de Vere, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Ida de Tosny Countess of Norfolk около декабрь 1181 г. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 6 дочерей. В 1220 году он работал по профессии constable  at norwich castle в местности рогир, сеинт поул, Остров Доминика. Он умер 2 августа 1220 г. в местности тетфорд, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 76 лет и был похоронен в местности тетфорд приори, тетфорд, норфолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Roger Bigod 3rd Earl of Norfolk and Suffolk nació en 1144, en Framlingham Castle, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Hugh Bigod 2nd Earl of Norfolk, tenía 49 años y su mamá, Juliana de Vere, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Ida de Tosny Countess of Norfolk aproximadamente diciembre de 1181. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 6 hijas. En 1220, su ocupación registrada era constable  at norwich castle en Roger, Saint Paul, Dominica. Murió el 2 de agosto de 1220, en Thetford, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 76 años, y fue sepultado en Thetford Priory, Thetford, Norfolk, Inglaterra.
